Calculation.Text: Case ( TF LI PI 1::Display text ≠ "" ; TF LI PI 1::Display text; TF LI PI 2::Display text ≠ "" ; TF LI PI 2::Display text; Value 1 ≠ "" ; Case ( List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "Color"; Color @ LI PI::Custom Color Name ; List template @ Page item::Value 1 type = "Link"; FAT Link @ LI PI::Name ; Value 1); "" )
